commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary — 08 Jul

NYSE dominates with the tightest liquidity profile across all metrics, posting an ILLIQ of 0.0014 and AR spread of 0.42%, establishing it as the clear benchmark. Nasdaq 100 follows closely, though its Roll spread widens to 1.72%. The LSE significantly trails at rank six, with ILLIQ reaching 0.1488—roughly 106 times higher than NYSE—and AR spread of 0.85%, suggesting materially higher transaction costs. European exchanges show intermediate liquidity, with Euronext outperforming both Xetra and the LSE.
